name: Lazy Perogi Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles as directed on package. Drain.
2. Line the bottom of a 9" x 13" pan with noodles.
3. In a medium bowl, mix cottage cheese, egg, and onion salt together.
4. Spread the mixture over the noodles.
5. Cover with a layer of noodles.
6. In the same bowl, mix cheddar cheese with potatoes, salt, onion salt, and pepper.
7. Spread this mixture over the noodles.
8. Cover with another layer of noodles.
9. Melt butter in a pan. Saute onions until transparent and soft.
10. Pour the sauteed onions over the noodles.
11. Bake for 30 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
12. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving.
13. Serve with sour cream.
